title: SSB Interview Decoded: Understanding the 5-Day Selection Process
author: Capt. R. K. Sharma (Retd.)
data: The Services Selection Board (SSB) interview is a comprehensive, scientific evaluation of your personality over 5 days. Day 1 starts with Screening (OIR tests & PPDT). Day 2 consists of psychological tests (TAT, WAT, SRT, and SDT). Day 3 and 4 involve Group Testing Officer (GTO) indoor and outdoor tasks. Throughout these days, personal interviews are scheduled. Finally, Day 5 concludes with the Board Conference. Assessors look for 15 Officer Like Qualities (OLQs) rather than bookish knowledge.
